title: Generic modules must query neutral tables, not mailbox-era views

content.principle: Control-plane modules that are not mailbox-specific must query neutral tables (context_records, context_revisions, outbound_handoffs) and must never reference conversation_records, conversation_revisions, or outbound_commands.
content.rationale: Mailbox-era schema is vertical-local compatibility only. Generic control-plane modules built against mailbox-era views create implicit vertical coupling that violates kernel substrate neutrality.
content.enforcement: CI lint via scripts/control-plane-lint.ts; review checklist for new persistence modules.
not_applicable_when: Modules inside adapter/graph/, normalize/, projector/, foreman/, or outbound/ worker code
